questions.question: Islamic Finance ka primary goal kya hai?

options.B: Shariah principles ke according financial transactions karna
options.D: Government funding par completely rely karna

questions.explanation: Islamic Finance ka primary goal Shariah principles aur Islamic law (Fiqh Muamalat) ke according financial transactions ko conduct karna hai.

questions.question: Maqasid al-Shariah mein se kaun sa ek important objective hai Islamic Finance ka?

options.B: Wealth ko sirf ek jagah concentrate karna
options.C: Social justice aur economic equity ko promote karna
options.D: Gambling aur speculative activities ko encourage karna

questions.explanation: Maqasid al-Shariah mein se ek key objective social justice aur economic equity ko promote karna hai, jo Islamic Finance ka core hai.

questions.question: Islamic banking conventional banking se kaise different hai?

options.A: Islamic banks sirf gold mein deal karte hain
options.B: Islamic banks interest (Riba) charge karte hain
options.C: Islamic banks Shariah-compliant transactions par operate karte hain aur Riba avoid karte hain
options.D: Islamic banks sirf government-owned hote hain

questions.explanation: Islamic banking ka fundamental difference yeh hai ki woh Shariah-compliant transactions par operate karte hain aur Riba (interest) ko avoid karte hain, jabki conventional banking interest-based hota hai.

questions.question: Islamic Finance mein Shariah Supervisory Board (SSB) ka kya role hai?

options.A: Bank ke employees ko manage karna
options.B: Bank ke marketing strategies decide karna
options.C: Yeh ensure karna ki bank ke products aur operations Shariah-compliant hain
options.D: Bank ke daily accounting tasks handle karna

questions.explanation: Shariah Supervisory Board (SSB) ka main role bank ke products, services aur operations ki Shariah-compliance ko monitor aur certify karna hai.

questions.question: Islamic Finance mein 'Halal' ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Permissible by Islamic law

questions.explanation: Halal ka matlab hai 'permissible' ya 'lawful' as per Islamic law.

questions.question: Islamic Finance industry mein AAOIFI ka kya significance hai?

options.A: Yeh ek international sports organization hai
options.B: Yeh Islamic financial institutions ke liye Shariah aur accounting standards set karta hai
options.C: Yeh sirf Middle East mein banks ko regulate karta hai
options.D: Yeh Islamic insurance products ko ban karta hai

questions.explanation: AAOIFI (Accounting and Auditing Organization for Islamic Financial Institutions) Islamic financial institutions ke liye global Shariah, accounting, auditing, governance, aur ethics standards develop aur issue karta hai.

questions.question: Islamic Finance mein 'Fiqh al-Muamalat' kya refer karta hai?

options.B: Islamic criminal law

questions.explanation: Fiqh al-Muamalat Islamic jurisprudence ki woh branch hai jo commercial transactions aur financial dealings ko govern karti hai.

questions.question: Islamic Finance mein transparency (wafaa) kyun important hai?

options.A: Customer ko confuse karne ke liye
options.B: Gharar (uncertainty) aur disputes ko minimize karne ke liye
options.C: Bank ke profits ko conceal karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Transparency Islamic Finance mein crucial hai taaki parties ke beech uncertainty (Gharar) aur future disputes ko avoid kiya ja sake.

questions.question: Islamic Finance mein risk sharing ka concept kya hai?

options.A: Sirf bank saara risk bear karta hai
options.B: Sirf customer saara risk bear karta hai
options.C: Profit aur loss dono parties ke beech share hote hain
options.D: Risk ko completely eliminate kar diya jaata hai

questions.explanation: Islamic Finance risk sharing ke principle par based hai, jahan profit aur loss dono contracting parties ke beech share hote hain, especially in partnership-based contracts.

questions.question: Islamic Finance ka ek fundamental principle kya hai jo conventional finance se alag hai?

options.B: Ethical and social responsibility

questions.explanation: Islamic Finance mein ethical aur social responsibility ek fundamental principle hai, jo conventional finance se alag hai jo primarily profit-driven hota hai.

questions.question: Islamic financial system mein 'asset-backed' financing ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Financing jo sirf shares par based ho
options.B: Har financial transaction mein real tangible assets ka involvement hona
options.C: Financing jo government bonds se backed ho
options.D: Financing jo virtual assets par based ho

questions.explanation: Asset-backed financing ka matlab hai ki har financial transaction mein real tangible assets ka involvement hota hai, jo speculative transactions ko avoid karta hai.

questions.question: Islamic Finance mein 'riba' ki prohibition ka primary reason kya hai?

options.A: Logon ko loan lene se rokna
options.B: Wealth distribution mein inequality ko prevent karna
options.C: Bank ke profits ko kam karna

questions.explanation: Riba ki prohibition ka ek major reason wealth distribution mein inequality ko prevent karna hai, kyuki interest wealthy ko aur wealthy banata hai aur poor ko further burden karta hai.

questions.question: Islamic Finance mein 'gharar' se kya avoid kiya jaata hai?

options.B: Clarity

questions.explanation: Gharar excessive uncertainty ya ambiguity ko refer karta hai, jise Islamic financial contracts mein avoid kiya jaata hai taaki fairness aur transparency bani rahe.

questions.question: Islamic banking mein deposits ko kaise treat kiya jaata hai?

options.B: Qard (interest-free loans) ya Mudarabah (profit-sharing) ke basis par
options.D: Sirf cash lockers mein rakha jaata hai

questions.explanation: Islamic banking mein deposits ko ya toh Qard (interest-free loan, current account) ya Mudarabah (profit-sharing investment account) ke basis par treat kiya jaata hai.

questions.question: Kon sa statement Islamic Finance ke liye sahi nahi hai?

options.A: Yeh ethical aur moral values par based hai
options.B: Yeh social welfare ko promote karta hai
options.C: Yeh har tarah ki speculation ko allow karta hai
options.D: Yeh real economic activity se linked hai

questions.explanation: Islamic Finance har tarah ki excessive speculation (Maysir) ko allow nahi karta, balki real economic activity aur asset-backed transactions ko promote karta hai.

questions.question: Islamic Finance ke history mein Prophet Muhammad (PBUH) ke time se hi kya practice ki jaati rahi hai?

options.B: Partnership-based trade (Musharakah/Mudarabah)

questions.explanation: Prophet Muhammad (PBUH) ke time se hi partnership-based trade aur finance (jaise Musharakah aur Mudarabah) ki practice ki jaati rahi hai, jo Islamic Finance ka ek core hai.

questions.question: Ek Islamic bank ka main objective kya hai, Maqasid al-Shariah ke perspective se?

options.A: Maximum profit generate karna at any cost
options.B: Wealth ko fair aur equitable tarike se circulate karna
options.C: Sirf rich logon ko services provide karna
options.D: Government policies ko blindly follow karna

questions.explanation: Maqasid al-Shariah ke perspective se, ek Islamic bank ka main objective wealth ko fair aur equitable tarike se circulate karna aur social welfare ko promote karna hai.

questions.question: Islamic Finance mein 'Riba' kya hai?

options.B: Interest charged on loans

questions.explanation: Riba ka matlab hai interest ya usury, jo Islamic Finance mein strictly prohibited hai.

questions.question: Riba ke types mein se kaun sa ek example hai?

options.A: Profit from selling goods at a higher price
options.B: Extra amount charged on a loan for delayed payment
options.C: Sharing profit in a business venture
options.D: Paying a fixed rent for a property

questions.explanation: Loan par delayed payment ke liye extra amount charge karna Riba al-Nasiah ka ek example hai, jo prohibited hai.

questions.question: 'Gharar' ka matlab kya hai Islamic Finance mein?

options.B: Excessive uncertainty or ambiguity in contracts

questions.explanation: Gharar excessive uncertainty ya ambiguity ko refer karta hai jo contracts mein ho sakti hai aur jise Islamic Finance mein avoid kiya jaata hai.

questions.question: Kon se activity mein 'Gharar' ki high probability hoti hai?

options.B: Selling a fish that is still in the sea
options.C: Leasing a house for a fixed rent
options.D: Investing in a known business with clear terms

questions.explanation: Ek aisi cheez ko bechna jo abhi tak control mein nahi hai ya jiska existence uncertain hai (jaise sea mein fish) usmein excessive Gharar hota hai.

questions.question: 'Maysir' ka kya matlab hai Islamic Finance mein?

options.B: Gambling or speculative activities

questions.explanation: Maysir gambling ya excessive speculative activities ko refer karta hai, jo Islamic Finance mein prohibited hain.

questions.question: Kon sa investment 'Maysir' ki category mein aa sakta hai?

options.A: Investing in a manufacturing company's shares
options.B: Betting on a horse race
options.C: Buying a property for rental income
options.D: Depositing money in a Mudarabah account

questions.explanation: Betting aur gambling activities Maysir ki category mein aati hain, jahan outcome purely chance par depend karta hai.

questions.question: Islamic Finance mein 'Halal' investments ki kya pehchan hai?

options.A: Woh high returns provide karte hain
options.B: Woh Shariah principles ko follow karte hain aur forbidden activities se door rehte hain
options.D: Woh quick profit generate karte hain

questions.explanation: Halal investments woh hote hain jo Shariah principles ko follow karte hain aur haram activities (jaise alcohol, pork, gambling, Riba-based finance) se door rehte hain.

questions.question: Islamic Finance mein kon se sectors mein investment karna 'Haram' mana jaata hai?

options.B: Technology

questions.explanation: Alcohol, pork production, gambling, conventional banking (Riba-based), aur pornography jaise sectors mein investment karna Haram mana jaata hai.

questions.question: Zakat ka primary purpose kya hai Islamic economic system mein?

options.B: Wealth ko purify karna aur poor logon mein redistribute karna
options.D: Bank ke profits ko increase karna

questions.explanation: Zakat wealth ko purify karta hai aur uska primary purpose poor aur needy logon mein wealth redistribute karna hai, thereby reducing wealth disparity.

questions.question: Islamic Finance mein 'Sadaqah' kya hai?

options.B: Voluntary charity
options.C: A type of loan with interest

questions.explanation: Sadaqah voluntary charity hai, jo Zakat se different hai kyuki Zakat mandatory hai aur Sadaqah discretionary.

questions.question: Kon sa principle Islamic Finance mein asset-backed transactions ko emphasize karta hai?

options.B: Riba (interest)
options.D: Real economic activity aur tangible assets

questions.explanation: Islamic Finance real economic activity aur tangible assets ke involvement ko emphasize karta hai, taaki financial transactions speculative na hon aur real value create karein.

questions.question: Islamic Finance mein 'ethical screening' ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Investments ko Shariah principles ke against screen karna

questions.explanation: Ethical screening ka matlab hai investments ko Shariah principles ke against screen karna, taaki forbidden sectors aur activities mein investment na ho.

questions.question: Ek Islamic financial institution mein 'Shariah compliance audit' kyun kiya jaata hai?

options.A: Sirf financial statements check karne ke liye
options.B: To ensure all operations and products adhere to Shariah principles
options.C: Marketing performance evaluate karne ke liye
options.D: Employees ki productivity measure karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Shariah compliance audit yeh ensure karne ke liye kiya jaata hai ki Islamic financial institution ke saare operations aur products Shariah principles ke according hain.

questions.question: Islamic Finance mein 'Waqf' ka kya role hai?

options.B: An endowment made by an individual for charitable or religious purposes

questions.explanation: Waqf ek endowment hai jo ek individual ya entity public ya charitable purposes ke liye banata hai, aur jiska principle amount intact rehta hai jabki uski proceeds charitable causes ke liye use hoti hain.

questions.question: Riba al-Fadl kis type ke transaction mein occur hota hai?

options.B: Exchange of two similar commodities of unequal quantity
options.C: Sale of goods with delayed payment

questions.explanation: Riba al-Fadl tab occur hota hai jab do similar commodities (jaise gold for gold) ko unequal quantity mein exchange kiya jaata hai, jo Islamic law mein prohibited hai.

questions.question: Islamic Finance mein 'Qard Hasan' kya hai?

options.B: An interest-free loan given for benevolent purposes
options.C: A business partnership where profits are shared

questions.explanation: Qard Hasan ek interest-free loan hai jo benevolent purposes ke liye diya jaata hai, jahan borrower sirf original amount repay karta hai.

questions.question: Kon sa statement Islamic Finance mein 'social responsibility' ko best describe karta hai?

options.A: Sirf profit maximization par focus karna
options.B: Community welfare aur ethical investments ko priority dena
options.D: Sirf wealthy individuals ko finance karna

questions.explanation: Islamic Finance mein social responsibility ka matlab hai community welfare aur ethical investments ko priority dena, profit ke saath-saath societal impact ko bhi consider karna.

questions.question: Murabaha contract kya hai?

options.B: A cost-plus-profit sale agreement

questions.explanation: Murabaha ek cost-plus-profit sale agreement hai jahan bank ek asset kharidta hai aur use customer ko ek agreed profit margin add karke bechta hai.

questions.question: Murabaha mein bank ka role kya hota hai?

options.B: Asset ko purchase karke customer ko resale karna at a profit
options.C: Customer ko direct cash provide karna

questions.explanation: Murabaha mein bank pehle asset ko purchase karta hai aur phir use customer ko ek agreed profit margin ke saath resale karta hai.

questions.question: Ijarah contract kya hai?

options.B: An interest-bearing loan contract
options.C: A leasing contract where the lessor owns the asset and leases it to the lessee

questions.explanation: Ijarah ek leasing contract hai jahan lessor (bank) asset ka owner hota hai aur use lessee (customer) ko rent par deta hai.

questions.question: Ijarah Muntahia Bil Tamleek mein kya special feature hai?

options.A: Lease ke end mein asset automatically lessee ko transfer ho jaata hai
options.B: Yeh ek short-term lease hai
options.C: Ismein lessee ko asset purchase karne ka option nahi milta
options.D: Yeh sirf services ke liye use hota hai

questions.explanation: Ijarah Muntahia Bil Tamleek ek lease-to-own structure hai jahan lease period ke end mein asset ka ownership lessee ko transfer ho jaata hai (ya toh sale ya gift ke through).

questions.question: Salam contract kis type ki financing ke liye use hota hai?

options.B: Forward sale of specified goods with deferred delivery

questions.explanation: Salam contract agricultural or industrial products jaise goods ki forward sale ke liye use hota hai, jahan payment advance mein ki jaati hai aur goods ki delivery future date par hoti hai.

questions.question: Salam contract mein buyer ke liye kya condition hai?

options.A: Buyer ko goods immediately receive karne hote hain
options.B: Buyer ko price future date par pay karni hoti hai
options.C: Buyer ko goods ki full price advance mein pay karni hoti hai
options.D: Buyer ko sirf partial payment karni hoti hai

questions.explanation: Salam contract mein buyer ko goods ki full price advance mein pay karni hoti hai, taaki seller ke paas production ke liye capital ho.

questions.question: Istisna contract kya hai?

options.A: An agreement for leasing a property
options.B: A contract for manufacturing goods, where the manufacturer undertakes to produce specified goods for the client
options.D: A contract for selling ready-made items

questions.explanation: Istisna manufacturing finance ke liye use hota hai, jahan manufacturer specific goods ko client ke specifications ke according produce karne ka agreement karta hai.

questions.question: Istisna contract kis industry mein zyada applicable hai?

options.B: Construction, shipbuilding, or specialized machinery manufacturing

questions.explanation: Istisna contract construction, shipbuilding, aur specialized machinery manufacturing jaise industries mein zyada applicable hai jahan custom-made products banaye jaate hain.

questions.question: Murabaha mein profit margin kaise determine kiya jaata hai?

options.A: Market interest rate ke basis par
options.B: Bank aur customer ke beech mutual agreement se
options.C: Government fixed rates ke basis par

questions.explanation: Murabaha mein profit margin bank aur customer ke beech mutual agreement se determine kiya jaata hai, aur yeh deal ki shuruaat mein hi fixed hota hai.

questions.question: Ijarah contract mein owner (lessor) ki primary responsibility kya hai?

options.A: Asset ko maintain karna aur major repairs cover karna
options.B: Asset ka daily operational cost bear karna
options.C: Asset ki insurance premium pay karna
options.D: Asset ko lease ke end mein purchase karna

questions.explanation: Ijarah contract mein lessor (owner) ki primary responsibility asset ko maintain karna aur major repairs cover karna hai, kyuki ownership uske paas rehti hai.

questions.question: Salam contract mein 'specific description of goods' kyun important hai?

options.A: Taaki seller ko zyada profit ho
options.B: Gharar (uncertainty) ko avoid karne aur dispute rokne ke liye
options.C: Goods ko expensive banane ke liye

questions.explanation: Salam contract mein goods ki specific description important hai taaki Gharar (uncertainty) ko avoid kiya ja sake aur future mein delivery ke time koi dispute na ho.

questions.question: Istisna contract mein payment terms kya ho sakte hain?

options.B: Sirf payment on delivery
options.C: Advance payment, installments, ya full payment on delivery, as agreed

questions.explanation: Istisna contract mein payment terms flexible ho sakte hain; yeh advance payment, installments, ya full payment on delivery, parties ke agreement par depend karta hai.

questions.question: Murabaha for working capital financing mein kya process hota hai?

options.A: Bank direct cash loan deta hai
options.B: Bank raw materials ya inventory buy karke client ko sell karta hai
options.C: Bank client ke behalf par employees ko pay karta hai
options.D: Bank client ke shares purchase karta hai

questions.explanation: Working capital financing ke liye Murabaha mein, bank client ke behalf par required raw materials ya inventory buy karta hai aur phir use client ko Murabaha terms par sell karta hai.

questions.question: Ijarah contract mein asset ka ownership kab transfer hota hai?

options.B: Lease period ke dauran kabhi bhi
options.C: Ijarah Muntahia Bil Tamleek ke case mein lease term ke end mein

questions.explanation: Normal Ijarah mein ownership transfer nahi hota. Lekin Ijarah Muntahia Bil Tamleek mein lease term ke end mein ownership transfer ho sakta hai.

questions.question: Kon sa contract 'debt-based financing' ki category mein aata hai?

options.B: Musharakah

questions.explanation: Murabaha ek debt-based financing contract hai kyuki ismein bank ek asset ko ek fixed profit margin par sell karta hai, jise customer installments mein repay karta hai.

questions.question: Ek customer ko car purchase karni hai. Kon sa Islamic contract suitable hoga agar woh interest avoid karna chahta hai?

options.B: Murabaha

questions.explanation: Car purchase ke liye Murabaha (cost-plus sale) ya Ijarah Muntahia Bil Tamleek (lease-to-own) commonly used Islamic contracts hain, jo interest-free alternatives provide karte hain.

questions.question: Tawaruq (Organized Tawarruq) mein kya issue hai jo kuch scholars consider karte hain?

options.A: Ismein real asset transaction nahi hota
options.B: Yeh interest-free loan provide karta hai
options.C: Ismein high risk sharing involve hota hai
options.D: Yeh commodity trading ko promote karta hai

questions.explanation: Tawaruq mein kuch scholars isliye issue dekhte hain kyuki iska underlying intention cash finance obtain karna hota hai, aur commodity transactions sirf ek formality hoti hain, real asset transaction nahi.

questions.question: Mudarabah contract kya hai?

options.B: A partnership where one party provides capital and the other provides management and labor
options.C: A contract for leasing an asset
options.D: A sale of goods with deferred payment

questions.explanation: Mudarabah ek profit-sharing partnership hai jahan ek party (Rabb-ul-Maal) capital provide karti hai aur doosri party (Mudarib) management aur labor provide karti hai.

questions.question: Mudarabah mein loss hone par capital loss kaun bear karta hai?

options.B: Sirf Rabb-ul-Maal
options.D: Dono parties as per their profit-sharing ratio

questions.explanation: Mudarabah mein, agar business mein loss hota hai (misconduct ya negligence ke bina), toh pura capital loss Rabb-ul-Maal (capital provider) bear karta hai.

questions.question: Musharakah contract kya hai?

options.B: A joint venture or partnership where all parties contribute capital and/or labor and share profits/losses

questions.explanation: Musharakah ek joint venture ya partnership hai jahan sabhi parties capital aur/ya labor contribute karte hain aur agreed ratio mein profits aur losses share karte hain.

questions.question: Musharakah mein loss distribution kaise hota hai?

options.A: Sirf working partner bear karta hai
options.B: Capital contribution ke ratio mein

questions.explanation: Musharakah mein, losses ko partners ke capital contribution ke ratio mein share kiya jaata hai.

questions.question: Sukuk kya hai?

options.B: An Islamic bond that represents ownership in tangible assets or services

questions.explanation: Sukuk Islamic bonds hain jo tangible assets, usufructs ya services mein ownership stake ko represent karte hain, conventional interest-bearing bonds se alag.

questions.question: Sukuk al-Ijarah kya represent karta hai?

options.B: Ownership in leased assets and their rental income

questions.explanation: Sukuk al-Ijarah leased assets mein proportional ownership ko represent karta hai, aur Sukuk holders ko un assets se generate hone wale rental income ka share milta hai.

questions.question: Wakalah contract kya hai?

options.B: An agency contract where one party acts on behalf of another

questions.explanation: Wakalah ek agency contract hai jahan ek party (agent) doosri party (principal) ke behalf par specific tasks perform karne ke liye authorized hoti hai.

questions.question: Kafalah contract ka primary purpose kya hai?

options.B: Guaranteeing a debt or obligation

questions.explanation: Kafalah ek guarantee contract hai jahan ek party doosri party ke debt ya obligation ko fulfill karne ki guarantee deti hai.

questions.question: Mudarabah mein Mudarib ko kya milta hai agar project successful ho?

options.B: A pre-agreed share of the profit
options.D: A fixed salary, regardless of profit

questions.explanation: Mudarabah mein, Mudarib ko project ke profit ka ek pre-agreed percentage milta hai (e.g., 60% Mudarib, 40% Rabb-ul-Maal).

questions.question: Diminishing Musharakah (Musharakah Mutanaqisah) kis liye use hota hai?

options.B: Home financing jahan customer gradually bank ka share purchase karta hai

questions.explanation: Diminishing Musharakah home financing mein commonly use hota hai, jahan customer gradually bank ka ownership share purchase karta hai jab tak woh asset ka sole owner na ban jaaye.

questions.question: Sukuk al-Musharakah kya represent karta hai?

options.B: Ownership in a Musharakah (partnership) venture
options.D: A promise to pay a fixed return

questions.explanation: Sukuk al-Musharakah ek partnership venture mein proportional ownership ko represent karta hai, aur Sukuk holders ko venture ke profits aur losses ka share milta hai.

questions.question: Wakalah bil Istithmar kya hai?

options.B: An investment agency contract where an agent invests funds on behalf of a principal

questions.explanation: Wakalah bil Istithmar ek investment agency contract hai jahan ek agent (jaise bank) principal (customer) ke funds ko Shariah-compliant investments mein invest karta hai for a fee.

questions.question: Musharakah mein profit sharing ratio kaise decide hota hai?

options.A: Sirf capital contribution ke basis par
options.B: Partners ke beech pre-agreed terms par, jo capital contribution se differ kar sakte hain
options.D: Sirf working partner ko saara profit milta hai

questions.explanation: Musharakah mein profit sharing ratio partners ke beech pre-agreed terms par decide hota hai, aur yeh unke capital contribution se different ho sakta hai agar working partner ki effort ko compensate karna ho.

questions.question: Sukuk ko conventional bonds se alag kya banata hai?

options.A: Sukuk holders ko fixed interest milta hai
options.B: Sukuk tangible assets se backed hote hain aur ownership represent karte hain
options.C: Sukuk sirf government issue karti hai
options.D: Sukuk ka maturity period bahut short hota hai

questions.explanation: Sukuk tangible assets se backed hote hain aur underlying assets mein proportional ownership represent karte hain, jabki conventional bonds debt obligations hote hain.

questions.question: Mudarabah mein Mudarib ki liability kab hoti hai loss ke liye?

options.B: Jab loss uski negligence ya misconduct ki wajah se ho

questions.explanation: Mudarabah mein, Mudarib sirf tab loss ke liye liable hota hai jab loss uski proven negligence, misconduct, ya Shariah terms ke violation ki wajah se ho.

questions.question: Musharakah mein 'Shirkat al-Milk' kya hai?

options.B: Partnership in ownership of an asset

questions.explanation: Shirkat al-Milk ka matlab hai kisi specific asset ki ownership mein partnership, jaise do log milkar ek property kharidte hain.

questions.question: Islamic Trade Finance mein kon sa contract use ho sakta hai for import/export business?

options.B: Murabaha or Wakalah

questions.explanation: Import/export business mein Murabaha (for purchasing goods) ya Wakalah (for acting as an agent to procure/sell goods) jaise contracts use ho sakte hain.

questions.question: Takaful kya hai?

options.B: Islamic insurance based on mutual cooperation and risk sharing

questions.explanation: Takaful Islamic insurance hai jo mutual cooperation, risk sharing, aur donation (Tabarru') principles par based hai, jahan participants ek fund mein contribute karte hain to cover each other's losses.

questions.question: Takaful conventional insurance se kaise different hai?

options.A: Takaful mein interest charge hota hai
options.B: Takaful mein policyholders fund ke owners hote hain aur surplus share karte hain
options.C: Takaful sirf wealthy logon ke liye hai
options.D: Takaful mein risk transfer hota hai, risk sharing nahi

questions.explanation: Takaful mein policyholders fund ke owners hote hain aur surplus (agar ho) ko share kar sakte hain, jabki conventional insurance mein insurer fund ka owner hota hai aur profit apne paas rakhta hai.

questions.question: Islamic current account ka main feature kya hai?

options.B: Yeh Qard Hasan (interest-free loan) ke basis par operate karta hai
options.C: Ismein investment ki guarantee hoti hai
options.D: Ismein funds lock ho jaate hain

questions.explanation: Islamic current account Qard Hasan ke basis par operate karta hai, jahan customer bank ko interest-free loan deta hai aur bank funds ki safety aur on-demand withdrawal ki guarantee deta hai.

questions.question: Islamic savings account mein profit kaise generate hota hai?

options.B: Bank funds ko Shariah-compliant investments mein invest karta hai aur profit share karta hai

questions.explanation: Islamic savings account Mudarabah ya Wakalah ke basis par operate karta hai, jahan bank funds ko invest karta hai aur generated profit ko customer ke saath share karta hai.

questions.question: Islamic home financing mein commonly kon sa contract use hota hai?

options.B: Murabaha or Diminishing Musharakah

questions.explanation: Islamic home financing ke liye Murabaha (cost-plus sale) aur Diminishing Musharakah (partnership-based lease-to-own) sabse common contracts hain.

questions.question: Islamic auto financing mein ek customer ko car kaise milti hai?

options.A: Bank direct car purchase karne ke liye loan deta hai
options.B: Bank car purchase karke customer ko Murabaha ya Ijarah basis par sell/lease karta hai
options.C: Customer ko khud car arrange karni padti hai
options.D: Bank sirf car insurance provide karta hai

questions.explanation: Islamic auto financing mein bank pehle car purchase karta hai aur phir use customer ko Murabaha (cost-plus sale) ya Ijarah (leasing) terms par provide karta hai.

questions.question: Islamic trade finance products ka kya maqsad hai?

options.A: To provide interest-bearing loans for trade
options.B: To facilitate international trade through Shariah-compliant methods
options.D: To invest only in local businesses

questions.explanation: Islamic trade finance products ka maqsad international trade ko Shariah-compliant methods (jaise Murabaha, Wakalah, Musharakah) se facilitate karna hai, Riba ko avoid karte hue.

questions.question: Kon sa product Islamic microfinance ke liye suitable hai?

options.B: Murabaha, Musharakah, Qard Hasan for small entrepreneurs

questions.explanation: Islamic microfinance small entrepreneurs aur low-income individuals ko finance provide karta hai using contracts like Murabaha, Musharakah, aur Qard Hasan.

questions.question: Islamic credit card kis principle par operate karta hai?

options.B: Ujrah (fee-based services) ya Qard Hasan (interest-free loan) with service charges

questions.explanation: Islamic credit cards Riba-free hote hain. Yeh ya toh Ujrah (service fee) model par operate karte hain jahan bank card services ke liye fee charge karta hai, ya Qard Hasan model jahan bank interest-free loan deta hai aur sirf actual expenses ya flat fee charge karta hai.

questions.question: Takaful operator ka main function kya hota hai?

options.A: To guarantee high returns to participants
options.B: To manage the Takaful fund and ensure Shariah compliance

questions.explanation: Takaful operator fund ko manage karta hai, investments ko Shariah-compliant rakhta hai, aur claims process karta hai, usually Wakalah (agency) ya Mudarabah (profit-sharing) basis par.

questions.question: Islamic bank mein 'investment account' kya hota hai?

options.A: A fixed deposit with guaranteed interest
options.B: A Mudarabah-based account where funds are invested in Shariah-compliant ventures
options.C: A current account with no returns

questions.explanation: Islamic bank mein investment account typically Mudarabah ke basis par hota hai, jahan customer (Rabb-ul-Maal) funds provide karta hai aur bank (Mudarib) unhe Shariah-compliant ventures mein invest karke profit share karta hai.

questions.question: Kon sa Islamic product long-term savings aur retirement planning ke liye suitable hai?

options.B: Takaful-linked investment plans

questions.explanation: Takaful-linked investment plans long-term savings aur retirement planning ke liye suitable hote hain, jo Shariah-compliant investments aur Takaful coverage combine karte hain.

questions.question: Islamic project finance mein kon se contracts commonly use hote hain?

options.B: Musharakah, Mudarabah, and Istisna

questions.explanation: Islamic project finance mein Musharakah (equity participation), Mudarabah (profit-sharing), aur Istisna (manufacturing/construction finance) jaise contracts commonly use hote hain for large-scale projects.

questions.question: Islamic bank mein 'Letter of Credit' ka Shariah-compliant alternative kya hai?

options.B: Wakalah-based Letter of Credit

questions.explanation: Wakalah-based Letter of Credit (LC) conventional LC ka Shariah-compliant alternative hai, jahan bank client ke behalf par agent ke roop mein act karta hai to facilitate trade.

questions.question: Ek Islamic bank apne customers ko short-term liquidity provide karne ke liye kon sa contract use kar sakta hai, bina Riba ke?

options.B: Tawarruq (controversial but used for liquidity) or Qard Hasan

questions.explanation: Short-term liquidity ke liye Islamic banks Qard Hasan (interest-free loan) offer kar sakte hain. Kuch banks Tawarruq (commodity murabaha) bhi use karte hain, although iski Shariah compliance par kuch scholars ke beech debate hai.

questions.question: Islamic wealth management services mein kya focus hota hai?

options.B: Shariah-compliant investment strategies, Zakat planning, and estate planning

questions.explanation: Islamic wealth management Shariah-compliant investment strategies, Zakat planning, Waqf endowments, aur Islamic estate planning par focus karta hai, taaki wealth ko ethical aur Shariah-compliant tareeke se manage kiya ja sake.

questions.question: Islamic financial institutions ko regulate karne wali international body kaun si hai?

options.B: International Monetary Fund (IMF)

questions.explanation: Islamic Financial Services Board (IFSB) ek international body hai jo Islamic financial institutions ke liye prudential standards aur best practices develop karti hai.

questions.question: AAOIFI ka primary role kya hai?

options.B: Shariah, accounting, auditing, governance aur ethics standards set karna
options.C: Islamic financial products ki marketing karna

questions.explanation: AAOIFI (Accounting and Auditing Organization for Islamic Financial Institutions) Islamic financial industry ke liye globally accepted Shariah, accounting, auditing, governance aur ethics standards develop karta hai.

questions.question: Islamic Finance industry ke saamne ek major challenge kya hai?

options.B: Lack of standardization and harmonization of Shariah interpretations

questions.explanation: Shariah interpretations mein lack of standardization aur harmonization (different fatwas on similar issues) Islamic Finance industry ke liye ek major challenge hai.

questions.question: Islamic banks mein Corporate Social Responsibility (CSR) ka kya role hai?

options.B: Core part of their operations, driven by ethical and Shariah principles
options.C: Optional activity, agar time mile toh
options.D: Government mandate, jise avoid kiya ja sakta hai

questions.explanation: Islamic banks ke liye CSR unke operations ka core part hai, jo Islamic ethics aur social justice ke principles se driven hai, sirf ek add-on nahi.

questions.question: Islamic Finance ke future growth ke liye kya important hai?

options.B: Innovation in Shariah-compliant products and digital transformation

questions.explanation: Islamic Finance ke future growth ke liye Shariah-compliant products mein innovation, technology adoption (digitalization), aur naye markets mein expansion crucial hain.

questions.question: Islamic financial institutions mein 'governance' ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Effective management, ethical conduct, aur Shariah compliance ensure karna
options.C: Sirf profit maximization par focus karna

questions.explanation: Islamic financial institutions mein governance ka matlab hai effective management, ethical conduct, transparency, accountability, aur Shariah compliance ko ensure karna.

questions.question: Islamic Finance mein 'ethical considerations' Shariah compliance se kaise relate karte hain?

options.A: Yeh ek doosre se completely alag hain
options.B: Ethical considerations Shariah compliance ka ek integral part hain
options.C: Shariah compliance ethical considerations ko override karta hai
options.D: Ethical considerations sirf conventional finance mein hote hain

questions.explanation: Islamic Finance mein ethical considerations Shariah compliance ka ek integral part hain. Shariah sirf legal permissibility nahi balki broader ethical framework bhi provide karta hai.

questions.question: Islamic financial institutions mein 'liquidity management' ek challenge kyun hai?

options.A: Too many Shariah-compliant liquidity instruments available
options.B: Limited Shariah-compliant interbank money market instruments
options.D: Easy access to conventional interest-based instruments

questions.explanation: Islamic financial institutions ke liye liquidity management ek challenge hai kyuki conventional interest-based money market instruments use nahi kar sakte, aur limited Shariah-compliant alternatives available hain.

questions.question: Islamic financial literacy kyun important hai?

options.B: Taaki log Shariah-compliant products ko samajh sakein aur sahi financial decisions lein
options.C: Sirf banks ke employees ke liye
options.D: Iska koi real world impact nahi hai

questions.explanation: Islamic financial literacy important hai taaki individuals aur businesses Shariah-compliant products aur services ko samajh sakein aur informed financial decisions le sakein.

questions.question: Fintech ka Islamic Finance par kya positive impact ho sakta hai?

options.B: Financial inclusion badhana aur Shariah-compliant services ko accessible banana
options.C: Traditional banking methods ko eliminate karna
options.D: Sirf wealthy clients ko target karna

questions.explanation: Fintech Islamic Finance mein financial inclusion badha sakta hai aur Shariah-compliant products aur services ko zyada accessible bana sakta hai, especially for underserved populations.

questions.question: Islamic financial institutions mein 'Risk Management' kaise different hota hai?

options.A: Risk ko completely ignore kiya jaata hai
options.B: Conventional risk management techniques ko bina modification ke adopt kiya jaata hai
options.C: Risk management Shariah principles aur ethical considerations ko incorporate karta hai
options.D: Sirf operational risk par focus hota hai

questions.explanation: Islamic financial institutions mein Risk Management conventional techniques ko adapt karta hai aur Shariah principles, ethical considerations, aur unique risks (jaise Shariah non-compliance risk) ko incorporate karta hai.

questions.question: Islamic financial markets mein Sukuk liquidity ko improve karne ke liye kya kiya ja sakta hai?

options.B: Standardized Sukuk structures aur secondary markets develop karna
options.C: Sukuk issuance ko band kar dena
options.D: Sirf government-issued Sukuk par focus karna

questions.explanation: Sukuk liquidity ko improve karne ke liye standardized Sukuk structures develop karna aur vibrant secondary markets create karna important hai jahan Sukuk ko easily trade kiya ja sake.

questions.question: Islamic Finance industry mein 'Human Capital Development' kyun crucial hai?

options.A: Employees ko zyada holidays dene ke liye
options.B: Shariah scholars aur Islamic finance professionals ki shortage ko address karne ke liye
options.C: Sirf entry-level positions fill karne ke liye
options.D: Technology ko replace karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Islamic Finance industry mein qualified Shariah scholars aur experienced Islamic finance professionals ki shortage ko address karne ke liye Human Capital Development crucial hai.

questions.question: Islamic Social Finance instruments jaise Zakat, Waqf, aur Sadaqah ka kya potential hai?

options.B: Poverty alleviation aur sustainable development goals mein contribute karna

questions.explanation: Islamic Social Finance instruments jaise Zakat, Waqf, aur Sadaqah mein poverty alleviation, income inequality reduction, aur sustainable development goals achieve karne ka immense potential hai.

questions.question: Islamic financial institutions ko kon se ethical values guide karti hain?

options.B: Justice, fairness, transparency, and social responsibility

questions.explanation: Islamic financial institutions ko justice, fairness, transparency, social responsibility, aur honesty jaise core ethical values guide karti hain.

questions.question: Islamic Finance ke global expansion mein kon sa factor helpful ho sakta hai?

options.B: Increasing awareness about ethical and responsible finance globally

questions.explanation: Global awareness mein growth regarding ethical, responsible, aur sustainable finance, Islamic Finance ke global expansion mein helpful ho sakta hai, kyuki iske core values in trends se align karte hain.
